arts.ttl: 'I woke village up when Liverpool won Champions League - but I rejected them for Arsenal'
arts.sum: Theo Walcott once admitted he 'went mad' when Liverpool won the Champions League but then snubbed them for Arsenal - going on to produce some memorable moments against the Reds

arts.ttl: Meet the Southampton player who has already scored a hat-trick against potential new manager Carlos Corberan
Liverpool have ‘no intention’ of pursuing Real Madrid swap deal
arts.sum: Liverpool have no intention of pursuing a swap deal with Real Madrid involving Ryan Gravenberch and Aurelien Tchouameni. Real Madrid are understood to have been impressed by Gravenberch’s performances this season with the midfielder having developed into a key figure for the Reds. The 22-year-old leads the Premier League for interceptions (31) and percentage […] The post Liverpool have ‘no intention’ of pursuing Real Madrid swap deal first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool XI vs Southampton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool continue their defence of the Carabao Cup with a trip to the south coast to take on Southampton. Arne Slot’s side can move into the semi-finals with a win at St Mary’s, as the Dutchman targets silverware in his first season in charge. arts.ttl: Southampton vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Managerless Southampton welcome Liverpool to St. Mary’s Stadium in the Carabao Cup quarter-finals tonight. Russell Martin was relieved of his duties as Southampton manager after his side lost 5-0 at home to Tottenham on Sunday night. Interim boss Simon Rusk has confirmed there are no fresh injury concerns but it is unclear whether Aaron Ramsdale […] The post Southampton vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool improve contract offer for star name, but club prepare for January meeting
arts.sum: Liverpool have improved their contract offer to star player Trent Alexander-Arnold, but it’s still not clear if he’s ready to accept the proposal as Real Madrid continue to hover.
